title: cyathocalyx hexagynus
intro: Cyathocalyx hexagynus, also known as the six-stamen tree, is a plant species found in the tropical regions of Asia and is a member of the family Annonaceae. The medicinal properties of Cyathocalyx hexagynus lie in its roots, which are used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce swelling and prevent infections. Cyathocalyx hexagynus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
